packs.scope: Verified Pack 1 foundation only: manual MeasureGrid, practice segment CRUD/selection, segment recording metadata, and Record again artifact evidence. This is not full v1/MVP completion; Pack 2 take review, Pack 7 reference/markers, Pack 9 audio-analysis infrastructure, and full reference/review/audio-analysis MVP behavior remain not_started/deferred.

Maintenance/codebase slimming workstream for reducing unnecessary compatibility, facade, duplicate IO, stale API, and test fixture bloat while preserving verified Pack 1 and Pack 2 behavior. This pack is not product feature scope and must run one small PR at a time with plan review before coding.

Post-Pack-C maintenance slimming follow-up based on the main-branch line/function scan and web ChatGPT review. This pack targets only verified real net deletion or maintenance-surface reduction: E2E helper duplication, narrow recordings-review normalization duplication, and explicitly reviewed deferred/no-go cleanup candidates. It must not use formatting, line wrapping, large-component splitting, generic DB adapters, package-lock churn, or assertion weakening as slimming.
